About & Experience

Versatile and passionate culinary professional with a strong background in Mediterranean and Greek cuisine. [cite: 9] Reliable, hardworking, and always willing to go the extra mile to deliver high-quality dishes. [cite: 10] Skilled in teamwork, quick problem-solving, and building positive kitchen environments. [cite: 11]

Key Expertise: Menu Development [cite: 54], Large-scale Banqueting (300+ people) [cite: 28, 68], Food Waste Reduction (-28%) [cite: 34, 65], Junior Chef Training [cite: 33, 56], Stock Management [cite: 63], Advanced Cooking Techniques [cite: 46, 70], and High-pressure Kitchen Operations[cite: 37, 44, 57].

Professional Timeline

  • 2024 - Present: Zelfstandig Werkend Kok | Residence Rhenen [cite: 14, 26, 27] (Banqueting for 300+ guests [cite: 28], seasonal menus [cite: 29])
  • 2021 - 2023: Chef Kok | Cafe Arnhem [cite: 16, 31, 32] (Led a team of 8 cooks [cite: 37], cut food waste by 28% [cite: 34], mentored 3 junior chefs [cite: 33])
  • 2018 - 2021: Sous Chef Kok | Kinono, Athens [cite: 18, 19, 38, 39] (Ensured plate composition, quality control, and consistency under pressure [cite: 40, 41])
  • 2015 - 2018: Zelfstandig Werkend Kok | Hilton, Athens [cite: 20, 21, 42, 43] (Refined luxury high-volume hotel kitchen standards [cite: 44, 45])

Signature Dishes

Specializing in customized Mediterranean and Greek menu engineering[cite: 9, 54]. Incorporating advanced cooking techniques to build signature flavor pairings and beautiful canvas presentations[cite: 45, 46, 70].

Banqueting & Events

Direct experience managing massive culinary events, specifically handling high-volume banqueting and formal services for groups exceeding 300+ guests while maintaining premium presentation[cite: 28, 30, 68].

Kitchen Leadership

Experienced kitchen leader. Managed brigades of up to 8 cooks simultaneously under tight timelines, trained junior staff, and cut margins down effectively by tracking food waste metrics (-28%)[cite: 33, 34, 37].

Fine Dining & Plating

A focus on strict presentation standards developed across high-end operations, executing visually impactful plates that match luxury international hospitality tiers[cite: 30, 45].

Mediterranean Concept

Deep expertise in authentic Greek and regional Mediterranean food cultures[cite: 9, 58, 66]. Balancing traditional preparation heritage with modern, creative execution styles[cite: 46].

Seasonal Menus

Implementation of custom seasonal rotations that align carefully with stock availability and portion control to preserve freshness and minimize overhead waste[cite: 29, 34, 62, 69].
